arguments_redacted.title: Neighborhood Cookout Plan
arguments_redacted.content:
## Summer Cookout Plan

Join your neighbors for a relaxed afternoon of grilling, games, and good conversation at our annual summer cookout. We'll gather in the community green, share a potluck-style meal, and enjoy the longest days of the year together. Bring a folding chair, your favorite side dish, and a friendly attitude.

### Preparation Checklist

- Confirm headcount and collect potluck sign-ups one week ahead.
- Pick up grilling supplies, drinks, ice, and serving ware two days before.
- Set up tables, the grill station, and trash and recycling bins the morning of the event.

[View menu](#menu)
